title: calamagrostis neglecta var. borealis
intro: Calamagrostis neglecta var. borealis, also known as boreal fescue grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the boreal regions of North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, making it useful in treating a range of health issues. The health benefits of Calamagrostis neglecta var. borealis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
